headline: Visual-variety strategy decided (ADR-0003, Adrian): SKINS are the unit — 2-4 coherent art directions (hero + section treatments + type scale + palette family + motion) behind one closed-enum config key, built as override-only presets over the section-variant rail; variants capped ~3/section, added only in service of a skin; bespoke stays the paid tier. Slice-2 execution now landing on main: PR #160 (closes #156) extended the satisfies-checked dispatcher rail from hero-only to services/gallery/reviews — invisible first-harvest refactor, no new variants, no schema change, byte-identical dist proven on demo-pressure-pros (31/31 sha256-matched), unblocks #130; PR #161 (closes #155 + #157) added the first two 'free-a-variable' brand dials — optional brand.fontPairing (heading≠body Google Fonts pairing) + brand.shadow (flat|soft|hard, soft = today's shadows), both additive so unset/default renders byte-identical, schema/template bumped to 0.3.0/0.5.0. Earlier the harvest slice hardened the rail: #134 (layout.sections closed enums, hero split-card/banner, purity gate, /variants gallery, template 0.4.0), #137/#139 (visual-baseline drift tripwire armed + green), ops vendored schema re-synced (ops#169). Fleet also merged #136 (branded OG-image fallback, closes #105) and #127 (demo e2e in ralph gate, closes #67). NOTE: hirobius/ops's vendored lib/schema copy still needs a follow-up re-sync for the new brand.fontPairing/brand.shadow fields — cross-repo, not reachable this session. All apps build clean. Engine frozen pending ops cutover (#10). Pre-revenue — no paying client yet.
next: OUTREACH: get the first paying client — the engine has enough variety; new skins wait for a real 'previews look samey' signal
On that signal (or freeze lift): build the skin mechanism (design key + override-only presets, content-packs pattern) then port realtor warm-editorial as skin #1 — parked issues under epic #128
Before hero variant #5 (i.e. before skin #1 lands): extract shared hero CTA/image partials (#133)

Ralph idle-watchdog + reconcile fix DONE fleet-wide; make `Engine tests` (hirobius/ralph) and each repo's ralph-gate the required branch-protection checks; triage ops's pre-existing red pnpm-audit gate (55 vulns, non-required); fix the ralph README's `git tag -f v1` line — v1 is a branch
Work the open needs-human backlog: trust/conversion fields (#87), per-vertical content packs (#85), analytics/conversion events (#84), aesthetics dials (#86)
Set real form.accessKey (Web3Forms) + hcaptchaSiteKey before any prospect outreach
Delete the frozen packages/agent engine once ops's first live generate passes (#10)
Re-sync hirobius/ops's vendored lib/schema (index.mjs, presets.mjs) with the #155/#157 brand.fontPairing + brand.shadow fields added here — this repo's schema is canonical, ops's copy is now behind
blocked: Skin mechanism + warm-editorial port parked on freeze/client signal (ADR-0003)
Autonomous site generation blocked on ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (in ops)
Engine delete (#10) waits on ops's first live generate
#84/#85/#87/#35/#41/#27 need a human decision before Ralph can pick them up
